summary: Comprehensive testing of Gen-AI LLM Powered Interactive Coding Environment completed. Backend APIs working excellently (11/12 tests passed). Frontend UI fully functional with Monaco editor, AI chat, code execution, and all major features working. Minor UI overlay issue with toast notifications identified.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 520 status instead of 400 for unsupported language
minor_bugs.impact: Error handling works but status code inconsistent

ui_bugs.issue: Success toast notifications block pointer events, preventing clicks on other buttons
ui_bugs.workaround: Wait for toast to disappear or dismiss manually

passed_tests: Python code execution with correct output
JavaScript code execution with correct output
Monaco editor loading and syntax highlighting
AI Assistant chat interface with responses
Settings dialog display and configuration info
GitHub dialog with form fields and actions
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix toast notification z-index/pointer-events CSS to prevent blocking user interactions with buttons. Consider auto-dismissing toasts after shorter duration or adding pointer-events: none to toast container.
